description: 纯粹主义派。客观性即美。数学精确网格，功能主义至上。
base_style_prompt: 8-column mathematical grid. All elements align to grid lines. Structured grid 70%, text 20%, accent 10%. Helvetica strict left alignment. Font weight contrast (300 vs 700). NO decorative elements. Pure geometric shapes only. Black lines for tables. Absolute objectivity.
path_note: Path A exclusive (HTML→PPTX). Strict grid system requires exact layout control.
philosophy: 客观性即美。数学精确的网格系统让任何混乱的信息变得有序。
